ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product the size chart is for (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size chart is for */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used in the size chart (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the size chart is applicable for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eu_sizes" (
  "eu_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EU size */,
  "years" TEXT /* Age range in years corresponding to the EU size */,
  "cm" REAL /* EU size in centimeters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the EU size */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the EU size is a standard size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eu_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "body_part" TEXT /* Body part being measured (e.g., shoulders, chest, neck, inseam) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used for the body part */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is required for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_measurements" (
  "size_chart_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart measurement */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being recorded */,
  "eu_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EU size the measurement corresponds to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was added to the size chart */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurement in the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurements_eu_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("eu_size_id") REFERENCES eu_sizes ("eu_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurements_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product line */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product line is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the product belongs to */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the product uses */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product has been discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, quality control specialist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the conversion belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the conversion is for */,
  "eu_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EU size being converted */,
  "local_size" TEXT /* Local size equivalent to the EU size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size conversion was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size conversion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size conversion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_eu_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("eu_size_id") REFERENCES eu_sizes ("eu_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)
